micro_rules: Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.

rows.command_eng: If the audio recorder is recording, stop recording and save as test.mp3; otherwise, start recording.
Stop charging if the voltage is 220V or higher.
If the cloud service is activated, upload test.png file to the cloud.
If the oven is in grill mode, add 4 more minutes.
If the rice cooker is on keep-warm mode, switch it to cooking mode.
If today is holiday, send an email to "test@example.com" with the subject "Holiday" and the message "Today is holiday.".
If the outdoor very fine dust level is 15 or higher, sound the emergency siren.
If the charger current is 10 amperes or above, sound the emergency siren.
If the pump is in normal mode, set it to maximum mode.
If the speaker is playing, stop it.

rows.command_kor: 녹음기가 녹음중이면 녹음을 중지하고 test.mp3로 저장해줘. 녹음중이 아니면 녹음을 시작해줘.
rows.command_eng: If the audio recorder is recording, stop recording and save as test.mp3; otherwise, start recording.
